postalAddress.value: Dunedin Office: 544 Great King Street, Dunedin
postalAddress.notes: Labour MP profile page contact section lists Dunedin office address and also lists 'Freepost PO Box 18 888, Parliament Buildings, Wellington 6160'.

donationMethod.details: No public, MP-specific donation method found; Labour provides a party donation page.
donationMethod.notes: Only clear public donation path located was via Labour Party donate page.

aiInvolvement.notes: Quick scan of Labour profile page did not mention AI or artificial intelligence (page includes spokesperson portfolio 'Space' in mps.json, but no AI content located here).

sourcesChecked.notes: Found Dunedin office address and Freepost Parliament postal address.
